conservative.name: Shared Pain
conservative.requirements: 6 favour. Engaged with target. You may not have a weapon in your hand (aside from a walking stick)

success.description: Choose fatigue, stress, normal wounds, corruption, critical wounds, insanities, diseases, or mutations. If you chose fatigue, stress, normal wounds, or corruption, the target recovers from up to X of that effect and you suffer the same amount. If you chose critical wounds, insanities, diseases, or mutations, the target recovers from one of the total severity no greater than X and you suffer the same

chaosStar.description: You must use the highest possible line and cannot choose to recover less than X or an effect with a severity less than X unless you have no other options
